tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All laboratory values are within normal limits except for mildly elevated chloride and slightly decreased total CO₂, which may suggest a mild metabolic acidosis or compensation. Renal function, glucose control, and lipid profile are unremarkable. No evidence of significant renal impairment or diabetes. Overall, results are stable and unremarkable for this age group; clinical correlation is advised.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
